mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, form_json, form_version, form_key, form_name, app_key
mapper.insert:
insert into t_upone_de_form
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
`status`,
flags,
form_json,
form_version,
form_key,
form_name,
app_key,
#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{formJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{formVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{formName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_upone_de_form
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
form_json = #{formJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
form_version = #{formVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
form_key = #{formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
form_name = #{formName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_upone_de_form set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, form_json = #{formJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, form_version = #{formVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, form_key = #{formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_name = #{formName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_upone_de_form (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, form_json, form_version, form_key, form_name, app_key) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.formJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.formVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
select
from t_upone_de_form where form_key=#{formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
